title: Reinforcement
description: Reinforce your tools and armor making them Unbreakable.
body:
This mod allows you to reinforce and repair your tools, weapons and armor.


**Repair Table**

using a Repair Table and a Repair Kit you can repair your damaged items.



**Reinforcement Table**

using a Reinforcement Table and a Repair Kit you can make your items unbreakable.



PLEASE REPORT BUGS ON MY [DISCORD SERVER](https://discord.gg/aYycXd9XeJ)

This mod is also available on [Curseforge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/reinforcement)
